title: China-to-Djibouti Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: Djibouti has limited publicly accessible PV-inverter-specific national EMC rules. For grid-tied PV inverter projects, the practical compliance package should therefore be built around internationally recognised IEC evidence requested by EDD, the Ministry of Energy, donors, lenders, EPCs, or project owners. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while the IEC 61000 series covers harmonic emissions, flicker, immunity, and other power-quality topics. Because Djibouti imports much of its electricity from Ethiopia hydro and is pursuing geothermal and solar additions, project reviewers may focus on grid stability, harmonics, and protection coordination for new distributed generation.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility, including harmonic current emissions, flicker, immunity, and power-quality limits as specified by the project
EDD or project-owner power-quality and commissioning requirements where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic testing by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These tests support China domestic voluntary certification and grid-operator expectations, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence in Djibouti project submissions. The same 50 Hz frequency is helpful, but EMC and harmonic performance should still be reviewed at Djibouti's 230/400 V voltage and under the final project configuration.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T EMC evidence should be treated as background only unless EDD or the project owner expressly accepts it. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 EMC reports and applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, and immunity evidence for the exact inverter model, firmware, filter, cable, enclosure, communications module, and site configuration. Where Chinese reports were produced at 220/380 V, confirm whether supplemental assessment or retesting at 230/400 V is required for Djibouti.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where EDD, the Ministry of Energy, a donor or lender specification, EPC, or project owner requires IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven under China domestic PV inverter certification and grid-connection practice; not an automatic Djibouti acceptance route

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti PV inverter EMC planning should be based on the IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence requested by EDD, the Ministry of Energy, lenders, EPCs, or the project owner. Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates are not automatically accepted. Review harmonic and EMC performance for the actual Djibouti 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration, especially where Chinese test reports were generated at 220/380 V.

source.publisher: Ministere de l'Energie charge des Ressources Naturelles, Djibouti

rows.requirement: EDD Grid Connection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
rows.target_requirement: Electricite de Djibouti (EDD) is the practical utility gate for grid-connected PV inverter projects in Djibouti. Publicly accessible PV-inverter-specific interconnection rules are limited, so exporters should obtain project-specific EDD connection conditions and Ministry of Energy or project-owner technical requirements before finalising equipment. The international evidence package should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface characteristics, applicable IEC 61000 power-quality limits, and site commissioning settings. Djibouti's commonly cited low-voltage grid is 230/400 V at 50 Hz: frequency is the same as China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
target_standards: EDD project-specific grid-connection conditions where applicable
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality limits as specified by EDD or the project owner
Djibouti low-voltage grid expectation: 230/400 V, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These files are prepared for Chinese grid-operator acceptance and China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz low-voltage baseline. They are not automatically accepted by EDD or Djibouti project owners as IEC 62116 or IEC 61727 evidence and do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Djibouti's 230/400 V network.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid documents are not a substitute for EDD project connection review. Exporters should obtain EDD written connection conditions, prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 reports for the supplied inverter model, map applicable IEC 61000 power-quality evidence, document the Djibouti firmware profile, and validate protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning tests for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Djibouti voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency aligns; the voltage differs.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for any EDD-connected project; exact documentary requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed with EDD, the Ministry of Energy, and the project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-operator requirements but does not transfer to Djibouti EDD connection acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EDD project connection conditions as the controlling grid gate for Djibouti. Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 files are useful engineering background only and are not automatically accepted. Prepare IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and applicable IEC 61000 evidence, then validate inverter firmware for Djibouti's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Frequency matches China, but voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.

rows.requirement: PV Inverter Safety and Market Access — IEC 62109, ANGMV, Ministry of Energy, and Desert Heat
rows.target_requirement: Djibouti's national standards and conformity assessment infrastructure for PV inverters appears comparatively weak and publicly documented requirements are limited. ANGMV, the Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donors, lenders, and project owners may therefore control the practical evidence package for imported PV inverters. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for PV power converters and inverters. For Djibouti, safety evidence should also address extreme desert heat, dust exposure, coastal corrosion near Doraleh and Djibouti port logistics, surge protection, service access, and thermal derating. Djibouti's role as a China-BRI logistics hub linked to Doraleh port and the Addis-Djibouti railway can make project documentation and customs coordination commercially important even where national PV standards are not mature.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ANGMV or Djibouti standards and conformity requirements where applicable
Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donor, lender, EPC, or project-owner import and technical specifications where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter safety files commonly include GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality files, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents support China domestic acceptance but do not create automatic market access in Djibouti. GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 should be mapped clause by clause to IEC 62109-1/-2 and supplemented with accredited IEC reports for international project use.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification schemes where held
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese domestic safety certificates are not an automatic substitute for IEC 62109 evidence or Djibouti project-owner acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or reports for the exact inverter model or family, a GB/T-to-IEC clause matrix, high-ambient thermal derating curves, enclosure IP and dust/corrosion evidence, surge-protection coordination, installation clearance requirements, and French or project-specified documentation where required. Because Djibouti is extremely hot and solar deployment is expanding alongside geothermal policy, verify inverter output derating, fan or cooling lifetime, capacitor temperature class, and warranty conditions at local ambient extremes before procurement.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; IEC 62109 evidence is mandatory in practice where required by EDD, ANGMV, the Ministry of Energy, customs, donors, lenders, EPCs, or project-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary under GB/T and CQC/CGC style China domestic PV inverter certification; not automatically accepted for Djibouti market access or project approval

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Djibouti PV inverter safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 plus project-specific ANGMV, Ministry of Energy, customs, EDD, donor, lender, EPC, or owner requirements. Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 evidence is not automatically accepted. Extreme desert heat is a real engineering gap: document derating, cooling lifetime, enclosure protection, dust, corrosion, and surge-protection assumptions before shipment.

source.publisher: Agence Nationale de la Metrologie et de la Verification (ANGMV), Djibouti
